mechanism_narrative: A sustained quarter-over-quarter increase in real GDP growth compresses equity risk premiums by confirming corporate earnings expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in quarters with positive GDPC1 growth are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid 3-month acceleration in the federal funds rate signals aggressive monetary tightening that raises discount rates and suppresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in triggered periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strong payroll growth and declining unemployment confirm a self-reinforcing labor market recovery that boosts consumer spending and corporate revenues, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns when PAYEMS rises and UNRATE falls are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production exceeding a threshold of 105 indicates robust manufacturing capacity utilization and supply chain health, which supports corporate margins and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns when INDPRO exceeds 105 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in housing starts signals improving consumer confidence and construction sector momentum, which leads positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through wealth effect channels.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in months with rising HOUST are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: The unemployment rate crossing below 5.0 percent signals a tightening labor market that reduces slack and supports wage growth, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as earnings expectations rise.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns when UNRATE drops below 5.0% are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price inflation combined with stagnant federal funds rates indicates a loss of monetary policy control, which triggers repricing of equity risk premiums and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns when CPIAUCSL rises and FEDFUNDS stagnates are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in retail and food services sales exceeding 5 percent signals a contraction in consumer demand that directly pressures corporate revenues, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns when RSAFS drops >5% are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
